skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered short video creation agent for product ads, social content, and brand videos.
skill.summary: Pexo is an AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music to produce 5-120 second videos in multiple aspect ratios.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static scanner flagged 534 patterns but all are false positives. The skill is a legitimate video production API client. Shell command substitution is standard bash scripting for curl/jq operations. Network calls go only to pexo.ai (the service's own API). Config file access and environment variables are expected for API authentication. No malicious intent, data exfiltration, or dangerous patterns detected.

low_findings.title: Static Scanner False Positives - External Commands
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 349 shell command substitution patterns. All are legitimate bash scripting: curl for API calls, jq for JSON parsing, date for timestamps, mkdir/cat/printf for file operations. No user input injection vectors exist.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Verified command substitution arguments are hardcoded strings or sanitized variables - no eval, no unsanitized user input passed to shell.

low_findings.title: Static Scanner False Positives - Network URLs
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 27 hardcoded URLs. All point to pexo.ai domain - the service's own API endpoint. No connections to external or suspicious domains detected.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All network calls are to the documented service API (pexo.ai) - expected behavior for an API client skill.

low_findings.title: Static Scanner False Positives - Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'weak cryptographic algorithm' in multiple files. No actual cryptographic operations exist in the codebase. The pattern matcher likely triggered on API key format validation or hash-like strings.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Code review confirms no crypto functions (MD5, SHA1, DES, etc.) are called. API key is passed as bearer token, not hashed locally.

low_findings.title: Static Scanner False Positives - Windows SAM Database
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'Windows SAM database' at SKILL.md:43. Line 43 actually contains language localization instruction: 'You MUST reply to the user in the SAME language they use.' This is a complete false positive - no Windows credential access.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Direct verification of line 43 shows text about language localization, not Windows security. Scanner pattern matched 'SAM' incorrectly.

low_findings.title: Static Scanner False Positives - Obfuscation Detection
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'dangerous combination' heuristics for obfuscation. The code uses transparent shell patterns with clear variable names and standard scripting idioms. No base64 encoding, string concatenation obfuscation, or dynamic code generation detected.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Full code review shows standard bash scripting with descriptive variable names and explicit command sequences - opposite of obfuscation.

content.user_title: Create AI-Generated Videos from Text Prompts
content.value_statement: Transform your video ideas into professional short-form content without editing skills. Pexo handles scriptwriting, composition, and production while you focus on your creative vision.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos from text descriptions
Support multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 1:1 for different platforms
Accept image, video, and audio file uploads as references
Handle scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music selection
Provide preview options for user selection before final rendering
Support iterative revisions based on user feedback
limitations: Cannot crawl web URLs - files must be downloaded and uploaded manually
Video production takes 15-20 minutes for short videos
Requires Pexo API credits for each video generation request
Does not support live streaming or real-time video generation

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional videos for e-commerce products, SaaS features, or brand campaigns by uploading product images and describing the desired message.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing professionals and small business owners

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts content quickly by describing the concept and uploading reference materials.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Explainer and Training Videos
use_cases.description: Produce educational content and training materials by providing scripts and supporting visuals for automated video creation.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 15-second product video for [product name]. The video should highlight [key features] and appeal to [target audience].
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick product showcase for social media

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second brand story video that conveys [brand values]. Use an [emotional tone] tone with [visual style] aesthetics.

prompt_templates.title: Video with Reference Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a video using this reference image <original-image>asset_id</original-image>. The video should [describe desired outcome] while maintaining the visual style of the reference.
prompt_templates.scenario: Product video with specific visual requirements

prompt_templates.title: Iterative Revision Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Please revise the video to [specific change]. The current version is close but needs [adjustment to pacing/music/visuals/text].
prompt_templates.scenario: Refining a generated video based on preview feedback

output_examples.input: Create a 15-second video for my coffee shop promoting our new seasonal menu.
output_examples.output: Video request submitted. Estimated completion: 15-20 minutes. Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123. You will receive preview options to select from before final rendering.

output_examples.input: Make it more energetic with faster cuts and upbeat music
output_examples.output: Revision request submitted. The video will be regenerated with faster pacing and upbeat background music. Check progress at your project link.

best_practices: Provide clear, specific descriptions of your desired video outcome rather than vague requests
Upload high-quality reference images for better visual results
Review preview options carefully and provide specific feedback for revisions
Allow 15-20 minutes for video generation before expecting delivery
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style details the user did not specify - Pexo will ask clarifying questions
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT status - this triggers duplicate production
Do not send bare asset IDs without proper XML tags - they will be ignored
Do not truncate the delivery URL - include all query parameters for proper access

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-30 seconds) typically take 15-20 minutes. Complex or longer videos may take additional time depending on the production requirements.

faq.question: What file formats are supported for uploads?
faq.answer: Images: JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, HEIC. Videos: MP4, MOV, AVI. Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, OGG, FLAC.

faq.question: Can I request changes after the video is generated?
faq.answer: Yes, you can request revisions by providing feedback through pexo-chat.sh using the same project ID. Revisions follow the same production timeline.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are available?
faq.answer: Pexo supports three aspect ratios: 16:9 (landscape for YouTube), 9:16 (vertical for TikTok/Reels), and 1:1 (square for Instagram posts).

faq.question: How do I add credits to my account?
faq.answer: Visit https://pexo.ai/home, click Credits in the top-right corner, select Buy Credits, and choose Extra Credits to purchase additional credits.

faq.question: What happens if video generation fails?
faq.answer: The system will provide an error explanation and project link. Common issues like insufficient credits include purchase instructions. You can retry after resolving the issue.
